description: You are a Fleet Manager preparing the FY2025 capital budget. Using 'fleet_analysis.xlsx' in your Documents folder, update the 'Inventory' sheet by calculating 'Total Maintenance Cost' (summed from 'Maint_Log' by VIN), 'Age' (based on the year 2025), and 'CPM' (Total Maintenance / Odometer) for each vehicle. Determine the 'Status' for each vehicle, marking as 'REPLACE' with a red fill if Age is 8 or more, Odometer is 200,000 or more, or CPM is $0.12 or more; otherwise mark as 'KEEP'. On the 'Policy' sheet, calculate the 'Total Budget Required' in cell H2 based on the count of 'REPLACE' vehicles and a new vehicle cost of $58,000. Save the updated file to its original location.
